name: Train Evaluation Set
description: Training evaluation cases for regression loop

cases.name: Simple Task - Optimizable
cases.input: What is the capital of France?

cases.name: Tool Call Task - Optimizable
cases.expectedOutput: tRPC is a high-performance RPC framework

cases.name: Knowledge Recall Task - Overfit Risk
cases.input: What is the meaning of 'regression' in machine learning?
cases.expectedOutput: Regression is a supervised learning task for predicting continuous values

cases.name: Complex Query - High Variance
cases.input: Analyze the impact of AI on software development productivity
cases.expectedOutput: AI significantly improves development efficiency through automation and assistance
